absorb.note: Heals half the damage dealt and logs the absorption event.

accelerock.note: Logs `accelerock_dash` so Dash priority is documented.

acid.note: Already handles the 10% SP. DEF drop for 5 activations on hit.

acid spray.note: Lowers SP. DEF by -2 stages for five activations when it hits.

acrobatics.note: No-item users gain +5 DB, lifting the effective base to 11.

acupressure.note: Roll 1d8 to buff Attack/Defense/S. Atk/S. Def/Speed/Accuracy (+2 CS), 8 picks the lowest stat.

aeroblast.note: Even accuracy rolls now trigger criticals.

after you.note: Schedules the target to act immediately after the caster.

agility.note: Increases Speed by +2 CS with an accompanying log event.

air cutter.note: Rolls ≥18 become forced criticals and emit an event.

air slash.note: Rolls ≥15 inflict Flinch on the defender.

ally switch.note: Swaps the user/ally positions and logs the switch.

amnesia.note: Buffs Special Defense by +2 CS and records the change.

anchor shot.note: Requires the user to be on an Anchor Token; traps the target for 2 rounds.

ancient power.note: Rolls ≥19 raise every combat stage by +1 CS.

apple acid.note: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 1 CS on hit.

aqua jet.note: Logs the priority attack so the 1st-strike effect is recorded.

aqua ring.note: Applies a healing coat that ticks each turn.

aqua tail.note: Records the pass-through strike in the log.

arcane fury.note: Makes the target Vulnerable on rolls of 19+.

arcane storm.note: Slows and makes each target Vulnerable for 1 round.

arm thrust.note: Five Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

aromatherapy.note: Cures one status from each ally.

aromatic mist.note: Raises each ally’s SP. DEF by +1 CS.

assist.note: Selects an ally’s move and logs which one was borrowed.

assurance.note: Boosts to DB 12 after the target has taken damage this round.

astonish.note: Flinches on ≥15 rolls and auto-flinches unaware foes.

astral barrage.note: Slows legal targets for one round on hit.

attack of opportunity.note: Attack of Opportunity triggers are handled by the interrupt/shift logic.

attack order.note: Critical hit threshold lowered to 18+ with a logged crit roll.

attract.note: Infatuates only opposite-gender targets; fails vs same-gender/genderless.

aura sphere.note: Cannot miss and already modeled via AC=None in the data.

aura wheel.note: Raises the user's Speed by +1 CS on hit.

aurora beam.note: Lowers the target's Attack by -1 CS on rolls of 18+.

aurora veil.note: Applies an Aurora Veil blessing to allies during hail.

autotomize.note: Raises the user's Speed by +2 CS.

avalanche.note: Queues as a set-up move; DB 12 if the target damaged the user this round.

baby-doll eyes.note: Lowers the target's Attack by -1 CS.

bane.note: Applies 3-turn tick damage and a -2 save penalty each turn.

baneful bunker.note: Blocks the next hit and poisons melee attackers.

barb barrage.note: Poisons on 17+ and can auto-max Five Strike once per scene if the target has a status.

barrage.note: Five Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

barrier.note: Places up to 4 barrier segments as blocking terrain on the grid.

bash!.note: On 15+ rolls, sets the target's initiative to 0 next round.

baton pass.note: Switches with an ally, transferring combat stages and coats.

beak blast.note: Declares a setup; burns melee attackers, then shifts and attacks at end of round.

beat up.note: Triggers adjacent allies to make Struggle attacks after the hit.

behemoth bash.note: DB increases by +2 per positive CS on the target, up to DB 20.

behemoth blade.note: DB increases by +2 per positive CS on the target, up to DB 20.

belch.note: Requires trading a Digestion/Food Buff earlier in the scene.

belly drum.note: Cuts the user's HP to about 50% and raises Attack to +6 CS.

bestow.note: Transfers the user's held item or uses it on the target.

bide.note: Stores damage taken, then releases it to adjacent foes.

bind.note: Applies Bind/Grappled/Trapped for 3 activations with tick damage.

bite.note: Flinches the target on a 30% roll.

bitter malice.note: Lowers the target's Attack by -1 CS for 5 activations.

blast burn.note: Applies the Exhaust penalty for the following turn.

blaze kick.note: Burns the target on a 10% roll.

bleed!.note: Applies Bleed for 3 turns, ticking damage each turn.

blind.note: Stealth contest can inflict Blinded for 1 activation.

blizzard.note: Freezes on 15+ and cannot miss during hail.

block.note: Leaves the target Stuck and Trapped until the user's next turn.

body press.note: Uses the user's Defense for damage calculation.

body slam.note: Paralyzes the target on rolls of 15+.

bolt beak.note: Deals +10 damage against lower-initiative targets that have not acted.

bolt strike.note: Status tracking already implemented in battle hooks.

bon mot.note: Guile contest enrages the target and blocks AP-spend (At-Will only) for 1 round.

bone club.note: Flinches the target on rolls of 18+.

bone rush.note: Five Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

bonemerang.note: Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

boomburst.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

bounce.note: Applies Vulnerable and paralyzes on rolls of 16+.

branch poke.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

brave bird.note: Recoil handling already covers the user damage.

breaking swipe.note: Lowers the target's Attack by -1 CS.

brick break.note: Shatters Reflect and Light Screen on hit.

brine.note: DB increases to 13 when the target is at or below half HP.

brutal swing.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

bubble.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS on 16+ rolls.

bubblebeam.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS on 18+ rolls.

bug bite.note: Steals a food buff from the target.

bug buzz.note: Special move resolution already handles its effects.

bulk up.note: Raises Attack and Defense by +1 CS.

bulldoze.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS on each hit target.

bullet punch.note: Logs the priority attack so the 1st-strike effect is recorded.

bullet seed.note: Five Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

bullseye.note: Critical hit threshold lowered to 16+ when the attack lands.

burn up.note: Removes the user's Fire typing after resolving.

burning jealousy.note: Burns nearby foes with raised combat stages once per scene.

calm mind.note: Raises Special Attack and Special Defense by +1 CS.

camouflage.note: Changes the user's type to match weather-based terrain defaults.

captivate.note: Lowers Special Attack by -2 CS against opposite-gender targets.

ceaseless edge.note: Crits on 19+ and applies a Vortex trap with tick damage.

charge.note: Raises Special Defense by +1 CS and boosts the next Electric attack.

charge beam.note: On hit, rolls 1d20 and raises the user's Special Attack by +1 CS on 7+.

charm.note: Lowers the target's Attack by -2 CS.

cheap shot.note: Priority strike handled by existing hooks.

chip away.note: Ignores defense stages and damage reduction for this attack.

chloroblast.note: Recoil handling already covers the user damage.

circle throw.note: Forced movement handling already covers the push effect.

clamp.note: Grants grapple contest bonuses and deals a tick on gaining dominance.

clanging scales.note: Adds half Defense to damage and lowers the user's Defense by -1 CS.

clangorous soul.note: Costs 1/3 max HP and raises all combat stages by +1 CS.

clear smog.note: Resets the target's combat stages after hit.

close combat.note: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by -1 CS after damage.

coaching.note: Raises the user's and nearby allies' Attack and Defense by +1 CS.

coil.note: Raises Attack, Defense, and Accuracy by +1 CS.

comet punch.note: Five Strike handling already covers the multi-hit behavior.

cone of force.note: Area resolution already covers the cone effect.

confide.note: Lowers the target's Special Attack by -1 CS.

constrict.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS and allows swift use while grappling.

conversion.note: Changes the user's type to a known move's elemental type.

conversion2.note: Changes the user's type to a move type that resists the last damage taken.

copycat.note: Copycat resolves the target's last move.

core enforcer.note: Disables a chosen target ability until the end of the encounter.

corrosive gas.note: Disables held items for the scene and suppresses Steel's poison immunity.

cosmic power.note: Raises Defense and Special Defense by +1 CS.

counter.note: Counter logic already implemented with damage reflection.

court change.note: Swaps hazards across the field and swaps team blessings.

covet.note: Steals a held item if the user isn't holding one.

crafty shield.note: Blocks incoming status moves for nearby allies as an interrupt.

cross poison.note: Critical hit threshold lowered to 18+ and poisons on 19+.

crush claw.note: Lowers Defense by -1 CS on even-numbered rolls.

crush grip.note: Damage base scales down by 1 per 10% missing HP on the target.

curse.note: Ghost users lose 1/3 max HP to curse a target; non-ghosts raise Attack/Defense and lower Speed.

darkest lariat.note: Ignores positive Defense stages and damage reduction.

dazzling gleam.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

deadly strike.note: Always critical hit when it connects.

decorate.note: Raises the target's Attack and Special Attack by +2 CS.

defend order.note: Raises Defense and Special Defense by +1 CS.

defense curl.note: Applies Curled Up, granting crit immunity, damage reduction, and accuracy penalty.

destiny bond.note: Binds targets and KOs them if they KO the user before next turn.

detect.note: Auto-triggers on hit to negate the incoming move as a scene reaction.

dirty trick.note: Uses Hinder, Blind, then Low Blow contests once per target each scene.

disable.note: Auto-triggers on hit to disable the attacker's move; manual use targets last move.

disarm.note: Combat/Stealth contest can drop the target's held item; Telekinetic focus works at range.

disengage.note: Shifts 1 meter without provoking attacks of opportunity.

double hit.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

double iron bash.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

double kick.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

double slap.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

double swipe.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

double team.note: Grants 3 activations that boost accuracy or evasion by +2.

double-edge.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

draco meteor.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

dragon ascent.note: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by -1 CS.

dragon claw.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

dragon dance.note: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by +1 CS.

dragon darts.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

dragon energy.note: Damage base drops by 1 per 10% missing HP.

dragon hammer.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

dragon pulse.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

dragon rage.note: Deals fixed 15 HP damage on hit.

dragon rush.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

dragon tail.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

drain punch.note: Heals the user for half the damage dealt.

draining kiss.note: Heals the user for half the damage dealt.

dream eater.note: Only affects sleeping targets, heals half damage, and does not wake them.

drill peck.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

drum beating.note: Lowers the target's Speed by -1 CS.

dual chop.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

dual wingbeat.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

dynamax cannon.note: DB increases by +2 per positive CS on the target, up to DB 20.

dynamic punch.note: Confuses the target and ignores evasion if the target is flanked.

earth power.note: Lowers Special Defense by -1 CS on 16+.

echoed voice.note: Damage base scales with Echoed Voice usage in the prior rounds.

eerie impulse.note: Lowers the target's Special Attack by -2 CS.

eerie spell.note: Once per scene, disables the target's last move used.

egg bomb.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

electric terrain.note: Electrifies the field for 5 rounds; grounded Electric attacks gain +10 damage and grounded targets are immune to Sleep.

electrify.note: Forces damaging Water or Melee attacks to become Electric until end of the user's next turn.

electro ball.note: Adds user Speed and target Speed into the damage calculation.

electroweb.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS on all targets hit.

embargo.note: Disables held items for the encounter; only one target at a time.

encore.note: Roll 1d6 to apply Confused, Suppressed, or Enraged.

endeavor.note: Deals tick damage equal to the user's injury count.

endure.note: Grants Endure to leave the user at 1 HP if a hit would KO them.

energy ball.note: Lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on 17+.

energy blast.note: Raises the user's Special Attack by +1 CS on 19+.

energy sphere.note: Raises the user's Special Defense by +1 CS on 19+.

entrainment.note: Grants one of the user's abilities for 3 turns.

eruption.note: Damage base drops by 1 per 10% missing HP.

eternabeam.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

ew adept.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

ew expert.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

expanding force.note: Creates Psychic Terrain in a Burst 7 for 5 rounds once per scene.

explosion.note: User loses HP equal to current HP plus 50% max HP.

extreme speed.note: Logs the priority attack so the 1st-strike effect is recorded.

facade.note: DB doubles to 14 when the user has a persistent status affliction.

fairy lock.note: Traps and slows legal targets while the user remains on the field.

fairy wind.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

fake out.note: On the join turn, resolves with Priority and flinches the target.

fake tears.note: Lowers the target's Special Defense by -2 CS on hit.

false surrender.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

false swipe.note: Never drops the target below 1 HP.

fa\u00e7ade.note: DB doubles to 14 when the user has a persistent status affliction.

feather dance.note: Lowers every legal target's Attack by -2 Combat Stages.

feint.note: Bypasses and removes shielding effects on the target.

feint attack.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fell stinger.note: Raises the user's Attack by +2 CS after it knocks out the target.

fell stinger [sm].note: Raises the user's Attack by +2 CS after it knocks out the target.

fiery dance.note: Raises the user's Special Attack by +1 CS on even-numbered rolls.

fiery wrath.note: Flinches the target on 17+ and may be used as Fire once per scene.

final gambit.note: Self-faints (HP set to 0) and then deals damage equal to the HP lost, ignoring item triggers.

fire blast.note: Burns the target on rolls of 19+.

fire fang.note: Burns or Flinches on rolls of 18-19 (coin flip) and both on 20, logging both status events.

fire lash.note: Lowers the target's Defense by -1 CS when it hits.

fire pledge.note: Tracks pledge combos; Fire+Grass creates fire hazards, Fire+Water creates Rainbow.

fire punch.note: Burns the target on rolls of 19+.

fire spin.note: Applies Vortex and Trapped for 3 rounds on hit.

first impression.note: On the join turn, resolves with Priority and flinches the target.

fishious rend.note: Bonus +10 damage versus lower-initiative foes (tracked by fishious_rend_bonus).

fissure.note: Rolls 1d100 versus 30 + level difference to instantly faint the foe; the log records the roll amount.

flail.note: DB increases by +1 per injury on the user.

flame burst.note: Adjacent allies that are cardinally adjacent to the target lose 5 HP when the hit lands.

flame charge.note: Raises the user's Speed by +1 Combat Stage after resolving.

flame wheel.note: Burns the target on rolls of 19+.

flamethrower.note: Burns the target on rolls of 19+.

flare blitz.note: Burns the target on rolls of 19+ plus applies the usual recoil handling (logged separately).

flash.note: Lowers every legal target's Accuracy by -1.

flash cannon.note: Lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on rolls of 17+.

flatter.note: Raises the target's Special Attack by +1 CS and confuses them.

fleur cannon.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fling.note: Consumes the held item and logs the thrown item.

flip turn.note: Switches the user out after dealing damage; ignores Trapped.

flirt.note: Infatuates the target (charm check not modeled).

floral healing.note: Heals 1/2 max HP or 2/3 in Grassy Terrain.

flower shield.note: Raises Defense of Grass-type targets by +2 CS.

fly.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

flying press.note: Chooses Fighting or Flying type damage based on effectiveness.

flying press [sm].note: Chooses Fighting or Flying type damage based on effectiveness.

focus blast.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

focus energy.note: Applies Pumped and extends the critical range by 2 until switching.

focus punch.note: Set-up move; fails if user takes 25%+ max HP damage before resolving.

follow me.note: Redirects foes to the user until the end of the next turn.

foresight.note: For the rest of the turn, Normal/Fighting moves can hit Ghosts.

forest's curse.note: Adds the Grass type for 5 turns.

foul play.note: Uses the target's Attack stat for damage.

freeze shock.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

freeze-dry.note: Treats Water as weak to Ice when calculating effectiveness.

freezing glare.note: Freezes on 19+ and may switch to Ice type once per scene.

frenzy plant.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

frustration.note: DB becomes 9 minus the user's Loyalty value.

furious strikes.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fury attack.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fury cutter.note: DB scales with consecutive hits and resets on miss/no damage.

fury swipes.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fusion bolt.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

fusion flare.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

future sight.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

gastro acid.note: Suppresses one of the target's abilities for the encounter.

gear grind.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

gear up.note: Plus/Minus targets gain +1 Attack and Special Attack.

gear up [ss].note: Steel-typed targets gain +1 Attack and Special Attack.

geomancy.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

giga impact.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

glacial lance.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

glaciate.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS and even rolls slow grounded targets.

gouge.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

grapple.note: Uses the grapple contest and applies Grappled/Vulnerable on success.

grass knot.note: DB equals twice the target's Weight Class.

grass pledge.note: Tracks pledge combos; fire creates hazards, water slows and -2 Speed.

grassy glide.note: Priority on Grassy Terrain; may create Grassy Terrain after hit.

grav apple.note: Lowers the target's Defense by -1 CS.

gravity.note: Creates Gravity/Warped terrain for 5 rounds with +2 accuracy.

growl.note: Lowers Attack by -1 CS on hit.

growth.note: Raises Attack and Special Attack; doubled in sun.

grudge.note: Marks the user to Suppress the attacker after a KO (interrupt style).

guard split.note: Applies -5 DEF/SPDEF stat modifiers to the target and 5 damage reduction to the user.

guard swap.note: Swaps Defense and Special Defense combat stages between user and target.

guillotine.note: Rolls a level-based d100 check to faint the target.

gunk shot.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

gust.note: Boosts DB against Fly/Sky Drop targets and logs the airborne hit.

gyro ball.note: Adds bonus damage based on Speed difference.

hail.note: Sets Hail weather and logs the weather change.

hammer arm.note: Lowers the user's Speed by -1 CS on hit.

harden.note: Raises the user's Defense by +1 CS.

haze.note: Resets combat stages for all combatants.

head charge.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

head smash.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

headlong rush.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

heal bell.note: Cures persistent status ailments in range.

heal block.note: Prevents healing until the target switches or takes a breather.

heal pulse.note: Heals 50% of max HP on a non-self target.

healing wish.note: User faints to restore target HP, injuries, and move frequency.

heart swap.note: Swaps combat stages between user and target.

heat crash.note: Damage base scales with weight class difference.

heat wave.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

heavy slam.note: Damage base scales with weight class difference.

helping hand.note: Grants +2 accuracy and +10 damage to the target's next attack this round.

hex.note: Once per scene, increases DB to 13 versus afflicted targets.

high horsepower.note: Sprint usage grants Smite and logs the sprint follow-up.

high jump kick.note: Miss recoil (1/4 max HP) unless blocked by a shield; blocked under Gravity.

hinder.note: Opposed Athletics contest applies Slowed and Hindered for 1 round.

hold hands.note: Applies Cheered to both combatants and grants 3 ticks of temp HP.

hone claws.note: Raises Attack and Accuracy by +1 CS.

horn attack.note: No special hook beyond baseline resolution.

horn drill.note: D100 execute check based on level difference.

howl.note: Raises the user's Attack by +1 CS.

hurricane.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

hydro cannon.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

hydro pump.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

hyper beam.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

hyper voice.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

ice ball.note: Consecutive uses scale DB by +3 up to DB 15 and reset on miss.

ice burn.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

icy wind.note: Lowers Speed by -1 CS on hit targets.

imprison.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

incinerate.note: Drops a held item on hit and logs when none are found.

infernal parade.note: Burns on 17+ and gains DB 12 once per scene vs afflicted targets.

inferno.note: Burns the target and can ignore evasion in open terrain.

infestation.note: Applies Vortex and Trapped for 3 rounds.

ingrain.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

instruct.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

intercept melee.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

intercept ranged.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

jaw lock.note: Triggers a free Grapple contest on hit.

judgement.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

jump kick.note: Miss recoil (1/4 max HP) unless blocked by shields; unusable under Gravity.

kinesis.note: Applies a one-use interrupt that imposes a -4 accuracy penalty.

land's wrath.note: Logs Groundshaper grant (no extra mechanics yet).

last resort.note: Requires five other distinct moves since the last switch.

leaf storm.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

leaf tornado.note: Center small/medium targets are missed; 15+ lowers Accuracy by -1 CS.

leer.note: Lowers Defense by -1 CS on hit.

mist ball.note: Even-numbered rolls lower Special Attack by -1 CS.

misty explosion.note: Implemented via explicit hook or generic handling.

misty terrain.note: Sets Misty Terrain for 5 rounds, blocks status/confusion for grounded targets, and halves Dragon damage.

moonblast.note: Lowers Special Attack by -1 CS on 15+.
